nasb.text: As he was traveling, it happened that he was approaching Damascus, and suddenly a light from heaven flashed around him;

esv.text: Now as he went on his way, he approached Damascus, and suddenly a light from heaven shone around him.

cnv.text: 他快到大馬士革的時候，忽然有光從天上向他四面照射。

ccb.text: 当他快到大马士革的时候，突然有一道光从天上射下来，四面照着他。

csbs.text: 当扫罗赶路，快到大马士革的时候，忽然有光从天上下来，四面照射他。
